data.title: The Role of Endoscopic Tri-Modal Imaging in Distinguishing Functional Dyspepsia From Reflux Disease
data.brief_summary: Endoscopic Tri-Modal Imaging which combines Narrow-band Imaging(NBI), Autofluorescence Imaging (AFI) and White-light Imaging (WLI) could be used to identify the indistinct changes in the gut caused by reflux disease,either acid reflux or bile reflux, which make it possible to differentiate reflux disease from functional dyspepsia (FD).
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* symptoms suggestive of GERD or dyspepsia.
* Presence of symptom for longer than 6 month
* Provision of written informed consent

Exclusion Criteria:

* Any known upper GI disease, other than reflux esophagitis
* Active or healing gastroduodenal ulcer (except scars)
* History o
endpoints: Numbers of participants with abnormal endoscopic findings and positive Omeprazole tests
